title: Cloudflare servers via unpinned mcp-remote are REVIEW

origin.description: Public documentation config from cloudflare/mcp-server-cloudflare (README.md (mcp-remote config)). Content verbatim; only normalized to a valid JSON root. Upstream placeholders preserved.

humanExpectation.rationale: Each server runs an unpinned mcp-remote bridge via npx, which is the review-worthy surface; the remote URL is an argument to that local bridge, not a directly-bound remote endpoint.
knownLimitations: Because the URL is an mcp-remote argument (not a url field), the engine treats this as a local unpinned npx package, not as a remote-source finding.
